title: Love and Leashes
tmdbOverview: Love never hurt so good for two co-workers who enter a contractual relationship as partners in consensual play, pleasure and pain.
synopsis: Released in 2022, Love and Leashes is a romance, comedy and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
